entries.desc: Exhilaration now also heals you for an additional 12.0% of your maximum health over 8 sec.
Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.
Disengage also frees you from all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 50% for 4 sec.
Exhilaration's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Survival of the Fittest gains an additional charge.
Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 5%.
Mend Pet heals for an additional 25% of your pet's health over its duration, and has a 25% chance to dispel a magic effect each time it heals your pet.
Your Agility is increased by 3%.
The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah is reduced by 30 sec.
Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.
Your auto shot damage is increased by 25%.
Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.
You gain 2% more critical strike from critical strike sources.
Removes 1 Enrage and 1 Magic effect from an enemy target.
Movement speed increased by 4%.
When Counter Shot interrupts a cast, gain 30 Focus.
The cooldown of Feign Death is reduced by 5 sec.
Misdirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next attack within 30 sec and lasting for 8 sec.
Tranquilizing Shot removes 1 additional Magic effect from up to 2 nearby targets.
If Tranquilizing Shot removes only an Enrage effect, its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.
Flare's radius is increased by 50%.
Haste increased by 2%.

Hurls a tar trap to the target location that creates a 8 yd radius pool of tar around itself for 30 sec when the first enemy approaches. All enemies have 50% reduced movement speed while in the area of effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.
Scares a beast, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only one beast can be feared at a time.
Your maximum health is increased by 5%.
You and your pet blend into the surroundings and gain stealth for 1 min. While camouflaged, you will heal for 2% of maximum health every 1 sec.

When Misdirection targets your pet, it reduces the damage they take by 50% for 5 sec.

The cooldown of Misdirection is reduced by 5 sec.
The cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by 30 sec.
Kill Command deals 10% increased damage.
You cannot be slowed below 80% of your normal movement speed while Aspect of the Cheetah is active.
Damage taken during Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by an additional 20%.

Your Spotting Eagle descends from the skies, stunning your target for 5 sec.

This ability does not require line of sight when used against players.

Wing Clip slows an additional 25%.

Concussive Shot slows an additional 10%.
The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by 2.0 sec.
Aspect of the Cheetah's initial burst of speed is increased by 2.0 sec.
Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow.
Your movement speed is increased by 30% anytime you have not attacked for 3 sec.
When a trap triggers, gain 30% increased movement speed for 3 sec.
When your Freezing Trap breaks, the victim's movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 sec.
The cooldown of Intimidation is reduced by 20 sec.
Intimidation now also stuns nearby enemies for 1.0 sec.
The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by 15 sec.
Critical strike chance increased by 2%.
Binding Shot's stun duration is increased by 1 sec.
When an enemy is stunned by Binding Shot, it is dragged to Binding Shot's center.
The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by 5.0 sec.
Feign Death and Aspect of the Turtle removes poison and disease effects from you.

Instructs your pet to protect a friendly target, reducing their damage taken by 15%, but 50% of all damage taken by that target is transferred to your pet. 

Lasts 10 sec or until your pet's health drops below 25%.
Your pet protects you at all times, reducing the damage you take by 3%. Your pet receives 100% of the damage it mitigates.

Your damage over time effects deal 10% increased damage.

This effect is increased by 50% on targets below 20% health.
A powerful aimed shot that deals 284 Physical damage.

Shoot a stream of 7 shots at your target over 1.8 sec, dealing a total of 178 Physical damage. Usable while moving.

Each shot generates 3 Focus.

Aimed Shot causes your next Arcane Shot or Multi-Shot to deal 50% more damage and cost 60% less Focus.

Precise Shots benefits Kill Shot's damage at 100% effectiveness.

Rapid Fire shoots 3 additional shots.

Aimed Shot grants 50% increased movement speed for 2 sec, decaying rapidly over its duration.
Your ranged auto attacks have a 10% chance to trigger Lock and Load, causing your next Aimed Shot to cost no Focus and be instant.
Rapid Fire deals 35% additional damage, and Aimed Shot has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Rapid Fire.

The damage bonus of Spotter's Mark is increased by 20%.

Additionally, your Eagle learns how to Fetch.

 Spotter's Mark
Damaging an enemy with abilities empowered by Precise Shots has a 30% chance to apply Spotter's Mark to the primary target, causing your next Aimed Shot to deal 20% increased damage to the target.

Regain access to Call Pet.

While outdoors, your pet deals 15% increased damage and takes 15% reduced damage.
When Multi-Shot hits 3 or more targets, your next Aimed Shot or Rapid Fire will ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets for 60% of normal damage.
Aimed Shot, Rapid Fire, and Arcane Shot now hit 1 additional target for 35% of their damage.
The damage of your auto shot is increased by 25% and its critical strike chance is increased by 15%.
Your Haste is increased by 2%.
Gain critical strike damage equal to 25% of your critical strike chance.

Your Spotting Eagle gains the Tenacity specialization, granting you Endurance Training and Air Superiority.

 Endurance Training
You gain 5% increased maximum health.

 Air Superiority
Your Spotting Eagle alerts you to oncoming danger, reducing all damage you take by 3%

Your Spotting Eagle gains the Cunning specialization, granting you Master's Call and Pathfinding.

 Master's Call
Your pet removes all root and movement impairing effects from itself and a friendly target, and grants immunity to all such effects for 4 sec.

 Pathfinding
Your movement speed is increased by 8%.
Your ranged ability critical strikes cause the target to bleed for an additional 10% of the damage dealt over 6 sec.

Trick Shots now causes Aimed Shot and Rapid Fire to ricochet to 2 additional targets.

Aspect of the Hydra's damage bonus is increased by 15%.
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 250 Physical damage. Only usable on enemies with less than 20% health.
Rapid Fire grants Precise Shots.

Increases your critical strike chance by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 15 sec.

 Aimed Shot
Cooldown recovers 40% faster.

 Rapid Fire
Cooldown recovers 60% faster.
Precise Shots now increases the critical strike chance of Arcane Shot and Multi-Shot by 10%
Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing 203 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Kill Command has a 0% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.
Damage from Kill Shot increases the damage your target receives from Kill Shot by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.
Kill Shot now has 2 charges and has its cooldown reduced by 2.0 sec.
When your abilities damage a target below 20% health, you gain 1% increased critical strike chance for 6 sec, stacking up to 30 times.

Trueshot sends your Spotting Eagle into a frenzy, instantly applying Spotter's Mark to your target. 

During Trueshot, your chance to apply Spotter's Mark is increased by 100%.
Explosive Shot deals 15% increased damage and Volley deals 25% increased damage.
When Aimed Shot damages a target affected by your Explosive Shot, Explosive Shot instantly explodes, dealing 20% increased damage.
Casting Explosive Shot has a 100% chance to grant Lock and Load.
The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 10%.
Trueshot's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Trueshot now increases your critical strike chance by an additional 10% and increases your critical strike damage by an additional 20%.

Aimed Shot deals 5% increased damage.

Rapid Fire deals 10% increased damage.
Consuming Precise Shots reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 2.00 sec.

Damage from Rapid Fire increases the damage of Aimed Shot by 1% for 15 sec, stacking up to 15 times.

New stacks do not refresh duration and are removed upon casting Rapid Fire.
Trueshot now also reduces the cast time of Aimed Shot by 40% and reduces the Focus cost of Aimed Shot by 60%.
Rain a volley of arrows down over 6 sec, dealing up to 587 Physical damage to any enemy in the area, and gain the effects of Trick Shots for as long as Volley is active.
When Surging Shots resets the cooldown of Rapid Fire, the damage of your next Rapid Fire is increased by 20%.

Consuming Precise Shots has a 30% to grant Precise Shots.

The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 15%.
Bulletstorm now increases your critical strike damage by 2%. Additionally, Bulletstorm now stacks 5 more times.
Casting Trueshot or Volley grants Double Tap, causing your next Aimed Shot to fire again at 80% power, or your next Rapid Fire to fire 80% additional shots during its channel.

Volley now also applies Explosive Shot to up to 2 targets hit.

 Explosive Shot
Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing 204 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

When Rapid Fire begins and finishes channeling, it releases an Arcane Shot at 100% effectiveness.

If your target is below 20% health, Rapid Fire instead releases Kill Shots.

Rapid Fire damage increased by 25%.

Each shot fired from Rapid Fire reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 0.50 sec.
Consuming Tip of the Spear grants 2% increased critical strike damage for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Flamefang Pitch damage increased by 15%.
Takedown summons your Sentinel Owl and your chance to summon your Sentinel Owl is increased by an additional 10% during Takedown.
Sentinel's Mark further increases the damage of Wildfire Bomb by 50%

Kill Command grants an additional 5 Focus and its damage is increased by 20%. 

Maximum Focus increased by 25.

Consuming Tip of the Spear has a 10% increased chance to summon your Sentinel Owl.

When your Sentinel Owl applies Sentinel's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 4.0 sec.

Your Eagle is replaced with a Sentinel Owl that applies an enhanced Sentinel's Mark.

Sentinel's Mark
Your next Wildfire Bomb deals 40% increased direct damage to the marked target.
When Sentinel's Mark is consumed, it summons a barrage of 4 lunar missiles, each dealing 70 Arcane damage to enemies within 10 yds.

Your movement speed is increased by 8%.

Aspect of the Cheetah's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

Enemy detection radius reduced by 10 yds.

While in Camouflage, your stealth detection radius is increased by 25 yds.
An additional 15% of Raptor Strike's damage is dealt as Arcane damage over 6 sec.
Consuming Sentinel's Mark grants you an absorb shield equal to 10.0% of your maximum health.

Tip of the Spear damage bonus increased by 4%.

Takedown duration increased by 2 sec.
Your Moonlight Chakram deals 25% increased damage each time it bounces.

For 15 sec after casting Takedown, Takedown is replaced with Moonlight Chakram.

 Moonlight Chakram
Throw a chakram blessed with moonlight at your current target that will rapidly deal 101 Physical damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby.
When your Moonlight Chakram expires, it summons an explosion of moonlight, dealing 71 Arcane damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Throwing your Moonlight Chakram reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 10 sec.
Black Arrow and Bleak Powder critical strike damage increased by 10%.

All pet damage increased by 6%.

Dire Beast damage increased by 10%.

Exhilaration grants you 3 sec of Survival of the Fittest.

Survival of the Fittest activates Exhilaration at 50% effectiveness.
While in combat, Disengage will chain the closest target to the ground, causing them to move 40% slower until they move 8 yards away.
While in combat, Disengage releases a fan of shadow daggers, dealing 0 Shadow damage per second and reducing affected target's movement speed by 30% for 6 sec.

Your auto shot now deals Shadow damage, allowing it to bypass armor.

Auto shot damage increased by 100%.

Kill Command has a 20% chance and Barbed Shot has a 50% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.
Black Arrow now explodes in a cloud of shadow and sulfur on impact, dealing 87 Shadow damage to all enemies within an 8 yd cone behind the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages 2 or more enemies, gain Beast Cleave if talented.

You fire 2 additional Black Arrows during Withering Fire's barrage.

Beast Cleave and Kill Cleave damage increased by 5%.

Casting Black Arrow has a 15% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.
Black Arrow deals 20% increased damage to enemies affected by Black Arrow's periodic damage.

Your Kill Shot is replaced with Black Arrow.

 Black Arrow
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

Bestial Wrath causes you to surrender to darkness, granting you Withering Fire for 10 sec and Deathblow.

 Withering Fire
Casting Black Arrow fires a barrage of 2 additional Black Arrows at nearby targets at 50% effectiveness, prioritizing enemies that aren't affected by Black Arrow's damage over time effect.
Kill Command causes your Dark Hound to Shadow Thrash, dealing 73 Shadow damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Bestial Wrath summons a Dark Hound.

For 15 sec after casting Bestial Wrath, Bestial Wrath is replaced with Wailing Arrow.

 Wailing Arrow
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 494 Shadow damage to your target and an additional 245 Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.
When summoning a Dire Beast, you have a 10% chance to instead summon a Dark Hound that deals significantly increased damage.
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing 121 Shadow damage and 140 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.
